title: Marde Driscoll
compiled_truth: Marde Driscoll is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-10 to 2001-06-11), Marde Driscoll sent 4 and received 171 emails, totalling 175 interactions. Top correspondents: [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (3), [Molly Lafuze](people/molly-lafuze) (2), [Angie Zeman](people/angie-zeman) (2), [East Desk](people/east-desk) (1), [Victor Lamadrid](people/victor-lamadrid) (1).
